since_last: 66% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.04%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.23% · BTC +2.58% · Gold +1.87% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 66% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.04%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.04%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.58%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.97%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.97%, APP +10.67%, META +10.14%, PLTR +8.84%, PATH +8.83%. Laggards: KLAC -10.18%, TER -9.44%, LRCX -9.15%, MU -9.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.89% at $159.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.89% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
